basic_details.job_title: ESIC Bhilai Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for 21 Specialist, Senior Resident Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Employees' State Insurance Corporation Bhilai (ESIC Bhilai)
basic_details.short_information: Employees' State Insurance Corporation Bhilai (ESIC Bhilai) Recruitment 2026: Employees' State Insurance Corporation Bhilai is conducting a Walk-in Interview for 21 Contractual Doctors posts. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for eligible candidates to attend the interview directly without any prior online application.

age_limit.age_details: Not exceeding 69 years for Full-time/part-time specialists/Specialist (Endodontist); Not exceeding 45 years for Senior Resident & Senior Resident against GDMO (Dentistry).
age_limit.details: Full-time/part-time specialists/Specialist (Endodontist): Not exceeding 69 years. Senior Resident & Senior Resident against GDMO (Dentistry): Not exceeding 45 years. Age relaxation as per rules for SC, ST, and OBC candidates.

qualification.education_qualification: PG Degree/Diploma, MDS, MBBS/BDS, Bachelor of Dental Surgery with relevant experience.
qualification.details: Full-time/part-time specialists: PG Degree / Diploma in the concerned speciality and registered with MCI. Experience: PG Degree or equivalent in the concerned speciality from a Recognized University With 3 (three) years' experience after acquiring PG Degree. OR 5 (Five) years' experience in the concerned speciality after acquiring PG Diploma. Specialist (Endodontist): PG Degree (MDS) in the concerned speciality and registered with DCI. Experience: PG Degree (MDS) in the concerned Speciality from a Recognized University With 3 (three) years' experience in a dental college/Medical College, after acquiring the PG Degree. Senior Resident: PG Degree/Diploma in the concerned speciality and registered with MCI. Preference will be given to a PG-qualified candidate. If PG Degree / Diploma candidates are not available in a particular speciality, then candidates having 2 years' experience after MBBS in the concerned speciality may also be considered. Senior Resident against the GDMO (Dentistry): Essential qualification: A recognized Bachelor of Dental Surgery degree qualification. Should be registered with any State Dental Council or Tribunal in India. Experience: Two (02) Years of experience is mandatory after acquiring the Degree. Preference will be given to candidates possessing Post graduation and/or experience from Government Organisation.

vacancy_details.Post Name: Senior Resident against GDMO (Dentistry) (On Contract Basis)

post_wise_breakdown.post_name: Senior Resident against GDMO (Dentistry) (On Contract Basis)

salary_details.pay_scale: Varies by post, e.g., Rs. 60,000/- per month for Part-Time Specialists, Rs. 1,37,837/- per month for Senior Resident (PG Degree), Rs. 56,100/- basic pay for Senior Resident against GDMO (Dentistry).
salary_details.full-time specialists: As per HQ guidelines issued vide letters No. Z-17/11/1/2007/Med. IV (Pt. file), dated 13.04.2022 and Z11012/1/2022-Med.IV, dated 08.12.2022).
salary_details.part-time specialists: Rs. 60,000/- per month for 16 hours per week (maximum 4 hrs. per day). Additional Rs. 15,000/- Charges if opted for Emergency visits. Additional Rs. 800/- for every additional hour beyond 16 hrs./week. (The additional hour of work shall be subject to approval by the MS).
salary_details.senior resident: Rs. 1,37837/- per month plus TA and DA on TA for a candidate having a PG Degree. An amount of Rs. 1350/- will be deducted for Senior Residents possessing only a Diploma, and Rs. 2250/- will be deducted if the Senior Residents do not possess a Diploma/Degree.
salary_details.senior resident against gdmo (dentistry): Remuneration equivalent to the Pay Level 10 of the 7th CPC, i.e. a basic pay of Rs. 56,100/- per month and other allowances (DA, HRA, NPA, TA, etc.) as applicable from time to time.

PG Degree/Diploma, MDS, MBBS/BDS, Bachelor of Dental Surgery with relevant experience.

content_sections.heading: ESIC Bhilai Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the ESIC Bhilai Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. rows.post_name: Senior Resident against GDMO (Dentistry) (On Contract Basis)

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Full-time/part-time specialists: PG Degree / Diploma in the concerned speciality and registered with MCI. Experience: PG Degree or equivalent in the concerned speciality from a Recognized University With 3 (three) years' experience after acquiring PG Degree. OR 5 (Five) years' experience in the concerned speciality after acquiring PG Diploma. Specialist (Endodontist): PG Degree (MDS) in the concerned speciality and registered with DCI. Experience: PG Degree (MDS) in the concerned Speciality from a Recognized University With 3 (three) years' experience in a dental college/Medical College, after acquiring the PG Degree. Senior Resident: PG Degree/Diploma in the concerned speciality and registered with MCI. Preference will be given to a PG-qualified candidate. If PG Degree / Diploma candidates are not available in a particular speciality, then candidates having 2 years' experience after MBBS in the concerned speciality may also be considered. Senior Resident against the GDMO (Dentistry): Essential qualification: A recognized Bachelor of Dental Surgery degree qualification. Should be registered with any State Dental Council or Tribunal in India. Experience: Two (02) Years of experience is mandatory after acquiring the Degree. Preference will be given to candidates possessing Post graduation and/or experience from Government Organisation.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Full-time/part-time specialists/Specialist (Endodontist): Not exceeding 69 years. Senior Resident & Senior Resident against GDMO (Dentistry): Not exceeding 45 years. Age relaxation as per rules for SC, ST, and OBC candidates.

rows.remuneration: As per HQ guidelines issued vide letters No. Z-17/11/1/2007/Med. IV (Pt. file), dated 13.04.2022 and Z11012/1/2022-Med.IV, dated 08.12.2022).

Rs. 60,000/- per month for 16 hours per week (maximum 4 hrs. per day). Additional Rs. 15,000/- Charges if opted for Emergency visits. Additional Rs. 800/- for every additional hour beyond 16 hrs./week. (The additional hour of work shall be subject to approval by the MS).

Rs. 1,37837/- per month plus TA and DA on TA for a candidate having a PG Degree. An amount of Rs. 1350/- will be deducted for Senior Residents possessing only a Diploma, and Rs. 2250/- will be deducted if the Senior Residents do not possess a Diploma/Degree.
Remuneration equivalent to the Pay Level 10 of the 7th CPC, i.e. a basic pay of Rs. 56,100/- per month and other allowances (DA, HRA, NPA, TA, etc.) as applicable from time to time.

rows.event: Interview for Specialist (All Departments except Dental) & Senior Resident
Interview for Dental Endodontist Specialist and Dental SR against GDMO

content_sections.heading: Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for ESIC Bhilai Various Posts Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for ESIC Bhilai Recruitment?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for Specialist (All Departments except Dental) & Senior Resident is scheduled for 28 July 2026, and for Dental Endodontist Specialist and Dental SR against GDMO, it is on 29 July 2026. Candidates should report between 09:00 AM and 11:00 AM.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Contractual Doctors at ESIC Bhilai?
faq.answer: There are a total of 21 vacancies for Contractual Doctors posts at ESIC Bhilai, including Specialist and Senior Resident positions.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application fee for ESIC Bhilai Recruitment?
faq.answer: The application fee is Rs. 500/- for General & OBC Candidates. SC/ST, Women & PWD Candidates are exempted from paying any fee.

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for Senior Resident posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for Senior Resident & Senior Resident against GDMO (Dentistry) posts is 45 years. Age relaxation is applicable as per government rules for reserved categories.

faq.question: Q5. What are the required qualifications for the Specialist post?
faq.answer: For the Specialist post, candidates need a PG Degree/Diploma in the concerned speciality and registration with MCI. Specific experience requirements vary based on whether the candidate possesses a PG Degree or Diploma.

faq.question: Q6. Can candidates apply online for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, this recruitment is being conducted through a Walk-in Interview. Candidates need to attend the interview directly with all required documents.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary for a Part-Time Specialist at ESIC Bhilai?
faq.answer: Part-Time Specialists can expect a remuneration of Rs. 60,000/- per month for 16 hours per week, with potential additional charges for emergency visits and extra hours.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, including ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates, and category certificates (if applicable), along with one set of self-attested photocopies.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any age relaxation for SC/ST candidates?
faq.answer: Yes, age relaxation is provided for SC/ST candidates as per the government rules and regulations for recruitment.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the walk-in interview venue?
faq.answer: The official notification should be referred to for the exact venue details. However, the recruitment is for ESIC Bhilai, Chhattisgarh.

faq.question: What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for ESIC Bhilai Recruitment?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for Specialist (All Departments except Dental) & Senior Resident is scheduled for 28 July 2026, and for Dental Endodontist Specialist and Dental SR against GDMO, it is on 29 July 2026. Candidates should report between 09:00 AM and 11:00 AM.
